description.ko: 시간 속에 얼어붙은 오디오 주파수의 시각적 표현으로, 액체 매체에 미치는 소리의 물리적 영향을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual representation of audio frequencies frozen in time, showing the physical impact of sound on a liquid medium.

prompt: An abstract 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, depicting a liquid mercury surface rippling into geometric peaks. Rhythmic pulse waves of #4169E1 royal blue and #FF4500 orange morph into crystalline frequency structures. Intricate #FFD700 golden particles and #32CD32 lime green peaks react to invisible audio oscillations in a dark obsidian void. High-speed motion blur, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of a powerful sound wave.
